response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches the first verse of the reference JSON but deviates in the second chorus (switching to Woodman), which I have transcribed accurately from audio. 2. The provided JSON was a sample; I am transcribing the full dialogue and performance. 3. Pacing is moderate for dialogue and rhythmic for the song; I am using precise millisecond anchors to ensure synchronization and prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: ポストしてください！
subtitles.english: Please post about it!

subtitles.original: 目指せトレンド入り、よろしくう！
subtitles.english: Let's aim for the trends! Thank you!

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、ちょっと息が整ってないですけど...
subtitles.english: Okay, so, I'm a bit out of breath...

subtitles.original: さて、今年の生誕ライブ、テーマは『ゲームソングライブ』です！
subtitles.english: Now, the theme for this year's birthday live is 'Game Song Live'!

subtitles.original: これまでたくさんやってきた実況配信で一緒に遊んできた思い出のゲームや...
subtitles.english: From games we've played together in past live streams...

subtitles.original: こよりが、大好きーなゲーム関連の楽曲をたくさん詰め込みました。
subtitles.english: To songs from games I love, I've packed so much into this.

subtitles.original: 最後まで全力で楽しんでいってね！
subtitles.english: Enjoy yourself to the fullest until the end!

subtitles.original: ということで、1曲目は大好きなポケモンのXYZを歌わせていただきました。ね、助手くん。
subtitles.english: So, for the first song, I sang XYZ from Pokemon. Right, Assistant-kun?

subtitles.original: 「俺はこいつと旅に出る」っていうことです。はい。
subtitles.english: It's like, 'I'm going on a journey with this guy.' Yes.

subtitles.original: Xでセトリ予想もね、みんなにたくさんしてもらってたんですけど、
subtitles.english: I saw many of your setlist predictions on X,

subtitles.original: ポケモンの予想は結構多かったけど、XYZ当てられてる人は結構少なかったです。
subtitles.english: and while many guessed Pokemon, few guessed XYZ.

subtitles.original: 当たった君、おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Congratulations to those who got it right!

subtitles.original: ま、この曲は、Z-Aが発売になったっていうのもあるんですけど、
subtitles.english: Well, this song was chosen partly because Z-A was announced,

subtitles.original: 歌詞がめっちゃ良くて、実はこよりにもぴったりな曲なので選びました。
subtitles.english: but also because the lyrics are perfect for me.

subtitles.original: さあ、この後も自分の予想が当たってるかなーって、ドキドキしながら楽しんでいってください。
subtitles.english: Now, keep guessing and enjoy the rest of the show with excitement.

subtitles.original: 新3Dお披露目もあるからね！絶対最後まで見てってね！
subtitles.english: There's a new 3D reveal coming too! Watch until the end!

subtitles.original: それでは、そろそろ次の曲。
subtitles.english: Now, it's time for the next song.

subtitles.original: ゲームの世界へ、どうぞ！
subtitles.english: Welcome to the game world!

subtitles.original: エアーマンが倒せない
subtitles.english: Can't Defeat Airman

subtitles.original: 気がついたら同じ面ばかりプレイして
subtitles.english: Before I knew it, I was playing the same stage over and over

subtitles.original: そしていつも同じ場所で死ぬ
subtitles.english: And I always end up dying in the same spot

subtitles.original: あきらめずに消える足場に挑戦するけど
subtitles.english: I don't give up and keep trying those disappearing platforms

subtitles.original: すぐに下に落ちるよ
subtitles.english: But I fall down immediately

subtitles.original: アイテム2号があれば楽に
subtitles.english: If I just had Item 2, I could easily

subtitles.original: 向こうの岸まで着くけれど
subtitles.english: reach the other side, but...

subtitles.original: 何回やっても 何回やっても
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try

subtitles.original: エアーマンが倒せないよ
subtitles.english: I can't defeat Airman

subtitles.original: あの竜巻 何回やってもよけれない
subtitles.english: That tornado, no matter how many times I try, I can't dodge it

subtitles.original: 後ろに回って 撃ち続けても
subtitles.english: Even if I get behind him and keep shooting

subtitles.original: いずれは風に飛ばされる
subtitles.english: Eventually, I'll be blown away by the wind

subtitles.original: タイム連打も 試してみたけど
subtitles.english: I tried spamming the time button too

subtitles.original: 竜巻相手じゃ意味がない
subtitles.english: But it's useless against a tornado

subtitles.original: だから次は絶対勝つために
subtitles.english: So, to make sure I win next time

subtitles.original: 僕はE缶だけは最後までとっておく
subtitles.english: I'll save my E-tanks until the very end

subtitles.original: 気がついたらライフも少ししかない
subtitles.english: Before I knew it, my life was almost gone

subtitles.original: そしていつもそこでE缶使う
subtitles.english: And I always end up using an E-tank right there

subtitles.original: あきらめずにエアーマンまでたどりつくけれど
subtitles.english: I don't give up and manage to reach Airman, but...

subtitles.original: すぐに残機なくなる
subtitles.english: I soon run out of lives

subtitles.original: リーフシールドがあれば楽に
subtitles.english: If I just had the Leaf Shield, I could easily

subtitles.original: エアーマンを倒せるけど
subtitles.english: defeat Airman, but...

subtitles.original: 何回やっても 何回やっても
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try

subtitles.original: ウッドマンが倒せないよ
subtitles.english: I can't defeat Woodman

subtitles.original: 落ちるコノハは何回やってもよけれない
subtitles.english: Those falling leaves, no matter how many times I try, I can't dodge them

subtitles.original: 後ろに下がって 距離をとっても
subtitles.english: Even if I back away to keep my distance

subtitles.original: いずれは距離を詰められる
subtitles.english: Eventually, he closes in on me

subtitles.original: タイム連打も 試してみたけど
subtitles.english: I tried spamming the time button too

subtitles.original: あいつのジャンプはくぐれない
subtitles.english: But I can't slide under his jump

subtitles.original: だから次は絶対勝つために
subtitles.english: So, to make sure I win next time

subtitles.original: 僕はE缶だけは最後までとっておく
subtitles.english: I'll save my E-tanks until the very end

subtitles.original: アイテム2号があれば楽に
subtitles.english: If I just had Item 2, I could easily

subtitles.original: 向こうの岸まで着くけれど
subtitles.english: reach the other side, but...

subtitles.original: 何回やっても 何回やっても
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try

subtitles.original: エアーマンが倒せないよ
subtitles.english: I can't defeat Airman
